patterns.icon-position-consistency: All tabs must use either inline icon positioning (left/right) OR stacked (top), but cannot mix both. Use the component-level iconPosition prop to enforce consistency across all tabs, or ensure individual tab iconPosition values follow this rule. The component will log a warning if mixed positions are detected (lines 52-68).
patterns.overflow-modes: The overflowMode prop has three behaviors: 'auto' (default) uses ResizeObserver to automatically detect and move tabs to dropdown when they don't fit; 'manual' requires you to provide overflowTabs prop with specific tabs to show in dropdown; 'none' disables overflow handling entirely and may cause horizontal scrolling.
patterns.named-slots-limitation: Custom tab content can only be provided via named slots tab-0 through tab-9, supporting a maximum of 10 tabs with custom content. This is an Astro limitation requiring static slot names. For tabs beyond index 9, only the standard tab rendering is available.
patterns.custom-events: TabStrip dispatches three custom events: 'tab-strip:tab-selected' (bubbles, includes tabId), 'tab-strip:close-tab' (from overflow dropdown close action), and 'tab-strip:open-new-window' (from overflow dropdown). Listen for these events on the TabStrip container to handle user interactions. The 'tab-strip:add-tab' event is dispatched when the optional Add Tab button is clicked.

events.name: change
events.description: Triggered when user selects a different tab

state.name: activeTab
state.description: Id or index of the active tab; controlled via props or script
